name: Spice Fig Balls
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees. Grease cookie sheets.
Cover the figs with boiling water and let stand for 10 minutes. Drain, then clip off the stems and cut fine with scissors. If using moist figs, you can skip the softening step.
Combine the shortening, molasses, and sugar in a large bowl. Heat to boiling, then cool to lukewarm. Add the ground ginger, beaten egg, vanilla extract, lemon extract, sifted baking soda, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, and salt. Stir in the chopped figs.
Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheets.
Bake for 12 minutes.
